Class VaccinationApplicationServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
shelter.application.impl.VaccinationApplicationServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
VaccinationApplicationService
public class VaccinationApplicationServiceImpl extends Object implements VaccinationApplicationService
Default implementation of VaccinationApplicationService that orchestrates vaccination recording, overdue checks, and vaccine type catalog management. Records audit entries for every mutating operation.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • VaccinationApplicationServiceImpl

      public VaccinationApplicationServiceImpl(VaccinationService vaccinationService, VaccineTypeCatalogService vaccineTypeCatalogService, AnimalService animalService, AuditService<Object> auditService)
      Constructs a VaccinationApplicationServiceImpl with the required service dependencies. All four services are mandatory; none may be null.
      Parameters:
      vaccinationService - the service for recording and querying vaccination records; must not be null
      vaccineTypeCatalogService - the service for vaccine type catalog management; must not be null
      animalService - the service for animal lookups; must not be null
      auditService - the service for recording audit log entries; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any argument is null

  • Method Details

    • recordVaccination

      public void recordVaccination(String animalId, String vaccineTypeName, LocalDate date)
      Records that an animal received a specific vaccine on the given date. Throws an exception if the animal is not found, the vaccine type name is not in the catalog, or the vaccine is not applicable to the animal's species. Looks up the animal and vaccine type by name, then delegates recording to VaccinationService.
      Specified by:
      recordVaccination in interface VaccinationApplicationService
      Parameters:
      animalId - the ID of the animal that was vaccinated; must not be null or blank
      vaccineTypeName - the name of the vaccine type administered; must not be null or blank
      date - the date the vaccine was administered; must not be null

    • getOverdueVaccinations

      public List<OverdueVaccination> getOverdueVaccinations(String animalId)
      Returns a list of vaccinations that are overdue for the given animal. Throws an exception if the animal is not found. Returns an empty list if all required vaccines are current.
      Specified by:
      getOverdueVaccinations in interface VaccinationApplicationService
      Parameters:
      animalId - the ID of the animal to check; must not be null or blank
      Returns:
      a list of OverdueVaccination records, ordered by due date ascending

    • addVaccineType

      public VaccineType addVaccineType(String name, Species applicableSpecies, int validityDays)
      Adds a new vaccine type to the catalog with the given name, applicable species, and validity period. Throws an exception if a vaccine type with the same name already exists.
      Specified by:
      addVaccineType in interface VaccinationApplicationService
      Parameters:
      name - the vaccine type name (e.g., "Rabies"); must not be null or blank
      applicableSpecies - the species the vaccine applies to (e.g., "Dog"); must not be null or blank
      validityDays - the number of days the vaccine remains valid; must be positive
      Returns:
      the newly created VaccineType

    • updateVaccineType

      public VaccineType updateVaccineType(String id, String name, Species applicableSpecies, Integer validityDays)
      Updates an existing vaccine type's fields by ID. Only non-null parameters are applied; omitted (null) fields retain their current values. Throws an exception if the vaccine type is not found or if the new name conflicts with an existing one. Fetches the existing vaccine type, merges only the non-null fields, then persists.
      Specified by:
      updateVaccineType in interface VaccinationApplicationService
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the vaccine type to update; must not be null or blank
      name - the new name, or null to keep the current value
      applicableSpecies - the new applicable species, or null to keep the current value
      validityDays - the new validity period in days, or null to keep the current value
      Returns:
      the updated VaccineType

    • removeVaccineType

      public void removeVaccineType(String id)
      Removes a vaccine type from the catalog by ID. Throws an exception if the vaccine type is not found.
      Specified by:
      removeVaccineType in interface VaccinationApplicationService
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the vaccine type to remove; must not be null or blank

    • listVaccineTypes

      public List<VaccineType> listVaccineTypes()
      Returns a list of all vaccine types currently in the catalog. Returns an empty list if no vaccine types have been added.
      Specified by:
      listVaccineTypes in interface VaccinationApplicationService
      Returns:
      a list of all VaccineType entries

    • listAllVaccinationRecords

      public List<VaccinationRecordView> listAllVaccinationRecords()
      Returns every vaccination record in the system, each wrapped in a view that resolves the animal and vaccine type display names. Returns an empty list if no vaccinations have been recorded. Orphaned records whose referenced animal or vaccine type can no longer be found are silently skipped. Resolves animal and vaccine type names by looking up each record's referenced IDs through the respective services. Records whose referenced animal or vaccine type cannot be found are skipped (defensive against orphaned rows).
      Specified by:
      listAllVaccinationRecords in interface VaccinationApplicationService
      Returns:
      a list of VaccinationRecordView entries
